info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  BojarAjasya matena 1.629 dala~ 1.564 vala~ 1.625 sKala~ 1.513 raRa~ 1.928 Dvana~ 1.434 trapU~za kzE 1.1061  ityetAH DAtavaH ete anena mitaH Bavanti  mittvasya PalaM tu mitAM hrasvaH 6.4.92 iti Ric-pratyaye pare aNgasya upaDAvarRasya hrasvAdeSaH - iti  yaTA dAlayati vAlayati kzapayati - AdayaH
